goal: Test whether Appearance Copy Before Count, Keep Active is the correct tail mechanic.
hypothesis_summary: The mechanic involves copying character appearance before beginning the zombification count, then keeping that appearance copy active throughout the count and final check. The copied appearance relati

steps.action: Create new character. Enter game. Locate quest NPC.
steps.what_to_record: Character name, race, starting gender, server type, NPC dialogue before quest start.

steps.action: Perform exactly ONE gender reroll using in-game method.
steps.what_to_record: Gender before and after reroll. Confirm only one reroll used.

steps.action: Build passive Blood Bar by waiting/playing naturally. Do NOT use commands.
steps.what_to_record: Blood bar state before building. Time spent. Method used.

steps.action: Select same-gender targets. Targets can be any race, non-unique.
steps.what_to_record: Target genders confirmed match post-reroll gender. Target races noted.

steps.action: Perform 40 same-gender manual-grip zombifications. Check NPC at count 40.
steps.what_to_record: NPC dialogue at count 40. Balance before and after. Any changes noted.

steps.action: Continue to 45 total. Check NPC at count 45.
steps.what_to_record: NPC dialogue at count 45. Balance before and after.

steps.action: Continue to 49 total. Check NPC at count 49.
steps.what_to_record: NPC dialogue at count 49. Balance before and after.

steps.action: Activate character mirror/copy mechanic. Use appropriate action to trigger appearance copy.
steps.what_to_record: Character appearance before and after activation. Any NPC dialogue triggered.

steps.action: Perform final zombification to reach 50 total while mirror is active. Check NPC immediately after.
steps.what_to_record: NPC dialogue at count 50 with mirror active. Final balance. Character appearance state.

steps.action: Record final state. Document NPC response. Take screenshots of key moments.
steps.what_to_record: Complete NPC dialogue log. All screenshots. Final character state.

pass_condition: NPC dialogue indicates quest completion or significant progress. Balance/appearance changes match expected outcome for this mechanic.
fail_condition: NPC dialogue unchanged after completing all steps. No progress indicator. Route fails to advance.
inconclusive_condition: Test interrupted mid-execution. Wrong character state used. Checkpoint missed. Ambiguous NPC response.
common_mistakes: Using auto-grip instead of manual grip
Wrong gender target selected after reroll
Activating mirror before passive Blood Bar is built
Server reset during test invalidates state
follow_up_on_pass: Test with opposite gender. Test with different count. Generate next tail mechanic test.
follow_up_on_fail: Reduce count and retest. Try simpler tail mechanic. Fall back to next hypothesis.
_evidence_context:
## Hypothesis: Appearance Copy Before Count, Keep Active
ID: HYP-APP_COPY-001
Status: active
Summary: The mechanic involves copying character appearance before beginning the zombification count, then keeping that appearance copy active throughout the count and final check. The copied appearance relationship must persist.

### Supporting Claims
- [CLM-0005] Character mirror (copy/mirror appearance) is a mechanic involved in the tail. (source: New Hint Reassessment — 2026-05-21, confidence: 0.72)
- [CLM-0008] Character copy relationship is confirmed in the image solution. (source: Hint Image 2 Green Analysis, confidence: 0.88)
- [CLM-0017] The tail involves copy/mirror character appearance + same-gender final zombify while mirror is active. (source: Final Solution Working Notes, confidence: 0.68)

### Open Questions
- ? How is appearance copy triggered?
- ? Does it require specific NPC interaction?
- ? Does the copy persist through server reset?
